summary: Iteration 48: Complete testing of 5 new feature sets - Bank Auto-Match Engine, Keyboard Shortcuts, PWA, WhatsApp Notifications, Daily Digest. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Fixed missing HTTPException import in scheduler.py. Frontend: All UI components verified working.

minor.issue: HTTPException was not imported in scheduler.py - FIXED by adding 'HTTPException' to imports

seed_data_creation: None - used existing bank statements for auto-match testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 tested 5 feature sets. All features working: (1) Bank Auto-Match: POST /auto-match returns matched/unmatched with stats, GET /matches returns match list, POST /confirm and DELETE /reject work correctly. (2) WhatsApp Notifications: channel_push and channel_whatsapp toggles save/load correctly via /api/push/preferences. (3) Daily Digest: /api/scheduler/ai-reports/daily_digest/trigger returns report preview with financial summary. (4) PWA: manifest.json complete with categories, scope, lang. sw.js has install/activate/fetch/push handlers with cache-first for static and network-first for API. (5) Keyboard Shortcuts: useKeyboardShortcuts.js hook active, ShortcutHelpDialog opens via Ctrl+/, DashboardLayout modal shows single-key and Ctrl+key shortcuts.

bank_auto_match_endpoints.GET /api/bank-statements/{stmt_id}/match: PASS - Returns list of matches with confidence scores
bank_auto_match_endpoints.POST /api/bank-statements/{stmt_id}/matc: PASS - Updates status to confirmed, 404 for non-existent
bank_auto_match_endpoints.DELETE /api/bank-statements/{stmt_id}/ma: PASS - Removes match, idempotent for non-existent

notification_preferences.GET /api/push/preferences: PASS - Returns all preference fields including channel_push, channel_whatsapp
notification_preferences.PUT /api/push/preferences: PASS - Updates channel_push and channel_whatsapp correctly

daily_digest_email.POST /api/scheduler/ai-reports/daily_dig: PASS - Returns message and preview with financial summary
daily_digest_email.GET /api/scheduler/ai-reports: PASS - Available reports include daily_digest with name/description

pwa_features.manifest.json: PASS - Contains name, short_name, display:standalone, start_url:/dashboard, scope:/, theme_color, categories, lang, 2 icons
pwa_features.sw.js: PASS - Contains install, activate, fetch (network-first for API, cache-first for static), push handlers

keyboard_shortcuts.useKeyboardShortcuts hook: PASS - Handles Ctrl+1..9, Ctrl+N, Ctrl+E, Ctrl+K, Ctrl+/, Ctrl+Shift+P/K/N/S, Escape
keyboard_shortcuts.ShortcutHelpDialog: PASS - Opens via window event 'shortcut:help' (triggered by Ctrl+/)
keyboard_shortcuts.DashboardLayout Shortcuts Modal: PASS - Shows single-key (D,S,E,I,R,A,V,T,L,W,C,K,H,O,?) and advanced (Ctrl+) shortcuts

reconciliation_page_ui.Tabs (data-testid=recon-tabs): PASS - Shows POS Reconciliation and Transaction Matches tabs

bug_fix_applied.issue: HTTPException not imported, causing 500 error for invalid report types
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added 'HTTPException' to 'from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException'

mocked_apis.WhatsApp sending: MOCKED - Twilio config (TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID etc) is empty in .env, send_whatsapp_notification silently skips if no config
